name: UKG Pro WFM (Dimensions) API
what_it_does: UKG Pro WFM (formerly UKG Dimensions, formerly Workforce Dimensions) REST API for cloud-native enterprise workforce management. Enables AI agents to manage AI-driven scheduling and forecasting for demand-based labor optimization, handle real-time time and attendance tracking for labor management, access employee self-service schedule management for shift trading and availability, retrieve advanced analytics and labor performance dashboards for workforce intelligence, manage multi-jurisdiction compliance and labor law rules for regulatory compliance, handle manager mobile workflows for on-the-go team management, access workforce planning and budgeting data for labor cost management, retrieve employee engagement and communication workflow data, manage integration with UKG Pro HCM for unified people management, and access open API ecosystem for workforce technology integrations.
use_cases: AI-driven schedule optimization from labor planning agents
Real-time attendance tracking from workforce management agents
Automated compliance checking from labor law agents
Manager exception handling from supervisory workflow agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise cloud WFM requirements
Legacy on-premises deployments incompatible with cloud WFM
best_when: A large enterprise with hourly or shift workers looking for cloud-native AI-powered workforce management wants AI agents to automate scheduling, attendance, compliance, and labor analytics through UKG's next-gen platform.
avoid_when: LABOR LAW RISK: UKG Pro WFM compliance rules automate labor law enforcement — automated rule modification without employment law review creates FLSA, state wage, and CBA violation risk. AI scheduling optimization requires forecasting accuracy validation; automated schedules based on inaccurate demand forecasts create over/understaffing costs. UKG Pro WFM is the successor to both Kronos Workforce Central and UKG Dimensions — customer migration status affects available API features.

auth.notes: UKG Pro WFM uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.ukg.com. Webhooks for workforce events. REST API with JSON. Lowell, Massachusetts HQ (UKG). Cloud-native WFM platform, successor to UKG Dimensions (2020, formerly Workforce Dimensions launched 2017). UKG formed from Kronos + Ultimate Software merger (2020). Private equity (Hellman & Friedman, Blackstone). 50,000+ UKG customers. Competes with Ceridian Dayforce, WorkForce Software, and Oracle WFM for enterprise cloud WFM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription plus implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per employee; professional services for implementation
pricing.notes: Lowell, Massachusetts. UKG formed 2020 (Kronos + Ultimate Software). Hellman & Friedman and Blackstone PE. UKG Pro WFM is strategic next-gen product. 50,000+ customers. Competes with Ceridian Dayforce, WorkForce Software, and Oracle for enterprise WFM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: LABOR LAW RISK: UKG Pro WFM compliance engine automates FLSA, state overtime, and CBA rules; automated rule changes without employment law review creates wage and hour liability
AI scheduling model dependency — UKG AI scheduling relies on historical demand data; initial deployment without sufficient historical data produces suboptimal schedules
Predictive scheduling law compliance — automated schedule changes in covered jurisdictions (OR, NYC, Chicago, Philadelphia) require minimum advance notice; violation creates legal exposure
API versioning — UKG Pro WFM has versioned API with deprecation notices; subscribe to developer changelog for breaking change notifications
Dimensions to Pro WFM naming — product renamed from UKG Dimensions to UKG Pro WFM; documentation may reflect both names; developer.ukg.com is canonical
Integration with UKG Pro HCM — Pro WFM and Pro HCM share employee master but have separate APIs; employee changes in Pro HCM propagate asynchronously to Pro WFM
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cloud WFM. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US/EU. Time, scheduling, and labor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cloud WFM. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US/EU. Workforce and labor data.
